calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

Petition For Order Determining Interest In Real Property And For Order Determining Interest In Real Property And For Order Transfering Title Of Real Property To Administrator
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dobrov appeared via zoom for Alexander Torres (petitioner).

The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

And For Order Determining Interest In Real Property And For Order Transfering Title Of Real Property To Administrator
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dobrov appeared via zoom for Alexander Torres (petitioner).

Mr. Dobrov stated that the decedent transferred the real property to the Estate of the Cruz Ramirez Torres as a trustee, that he was not married at the time, and that he will follow up with a due diligence declaration prior to the next hearing.

The matter is continued to May 11, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Counsel to file a decalaration one week prior to the hearing.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
